headline: Jim Cramer on CrowdStrike (CRWD): “I Think the Second Half of the Year is Going to Be Really Good”
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been. When a caller mentioned that the “Mythos scare” is likely to “come into play” during Q2, Cramer said: Actually, no, it came into […]
